monday.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: She didn't went to the party.
She didn't go to the party.
She not go to the party.
She didn't gone to the party.
monday.correctAnswer: She didn't go to the party.

monday.question: Complete: 'They _____ (travel) to another city last month.'
Complete: '_____ he see that movie last night?'
Translate 'I'd love to, but I can't make it.' to Portuguese.
monday.correctAnswer: Adoraria, mas não consigo ir.|Eu adoraria, mas não posso comparecer.

monday.question: Choose the correct form: 'My parents _____ at home yesterday.'
Complete: 'I _____ (eat) a delicious meal at that restaurant last week.'
Complete with the correct form of the verb: 'He didn't _____ (come) to class yesterday.'
What does 'Count me in!' mean in Portuguese?
What is the correct negative form of 'She went to the gym'?
options: She didn't went to the gym.
She not went to the gym.
She didn't go to the gym.
She wasn't go to the gym.
monday.correctAnswer: She didn't go to the gym.

monday.question: Complete: 'We _____ going to have a barbecue this weekend.'
Complete with 'was' or 'were': 'The concert _____ amazing last Saturday.'
Translate 'Unfortunately, I can't make it.' to Portuguese.
monday.correctAnswer: Infelizmente, não consigo ir.|Infelizmente, não posso comparecer.

monday.question: Which sentence uses 'going to' correctly?
options: She is go to visit her friend.
She going to visit her friend.
She is going to visit her friend.
She is going visit her friend.
monday.correctAnswer: She is going to visit her friend.

monday.question: Complete: 'He _____ (write) a letter to his friend two days ago.'
Complete the time expression: 'Did you study for the exam _____ night?'
Translate 'What did you do last weekend?' to Portuguese.
monday.correctAnswer: O que você fez no fim de semana passado?|O que você fez no último fim de semana?

monday.question: Which is the correct question form?
options: Did she bought a new phone?
Did she buy a new phone?
Did she buys a new phone?
She did buy a new phone?
monday.correctAnswer: Did she buy a new phone?

monday.question: Complete: 'They _____ (cook) dinner for everyone last night.'
Complete the suggestion: 'Why don't we _____ to the concert tonight?'
Translate 'I felt exhausted after the trip.' to Portuguese.
monday.correctAnswer: Eu me senti exausto depois da viagem.|Fiquei exausto após a viagem.

tuesday.question: Choose the correct past tense of 'take':
Complete: 'She _____ (visit) her grandparents last Sunday.'
Translate 'Would you like to come to my party?' to Portuguese.
tuesday.correctAnswer: Você gostaria de vir à minha festa?|Você quer vir à minha festa?

tuesday.question: Complete with the past of 'be': 'I _____ very surprised when I heard the news.'

Complete: 'We _____ (get) lost on the way to the restaurant last night.'
Complete the question: '_____ they have a good time at the concert?'
Translate 'Let me check my schedule.' to Portuguese.
tuesday.correctAnswer: Deixa eu verificar minha agenda.|Deixe-me checar minha agenda.

tuesday.question: Choose the correct sentence about a future plan:
options: I am going to study tomorrow.
I will going to study tomorrow.
tuesday.correctAnswer: I am going to study tomorrow.

tuesday.question: Complete: 'She _____ (meet) an old friend at the café three weeks ago.'
Complete with the past of 'be': 'How _____ your trip last week?'
Translate 'I'll let you know.' to Portuguese.
tuesday.correctAnswer: Eu te aviso.|Vou te dizer.|Eu te conto.

tuesday.question: Which sentence has the correct negative form?
Complete: 'He is _____ to start a new job next week.'
Complete with the correct past form: 'I _____ (drink) too much coffee yesterday and couldn't sleep.'
Translate 'Maybe next time.' to Portuguese.
tuesday.correctAnswer: Talvez da próxima vez.|Quem sabe da próxima.

tuesday.question: Choose the correct short answer to: 'Did you enjoy the barbecue?'
options: Yes, I enjoyed it very much, thanks.

tuesday.question: Complete: 'We _____ (play) volleyball at the beach last Saturday.'
Complete the suggestion: 'How about _____ a movie tonight?'
Translate 'The movie was really boring.' to Portuguese.
tuesday.correctAnswer: O filme foi muito chato.|O filme era muito entediante.

wednesday.question: Choose the correct past tense of 'find':
Complete: 'She _____ (make) a cake for her friend's birthday yesterday.'
Complete the polite decline: 'I'm sorry, I _____.' (one word)
Translate 'Do you want to go to the beach this weekend?' to Portuguese.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Você quer ir à praia este fim de semana?|Quer ir à praia neste fim de semana?

wednesday.question: Choose the correct forms of 'be' in the past: 'I _____ tired. You _____ not there.'
Complete: 'They _____ (leave) the party early because they were tired.'
Complete the question: 'What _____ you do last Saturday?'
Translate 'Can I get back to you?' to Portuguese.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Posso te responder depois?|Posso te dar uma resposta depois?

wednesday.question: Which sentence uses 'going to' to express a plan (not a current action)?
options: They are going to the store right now.
They are going to visit us next week.
They went to the park last night.
They will going to arrive soon.
wednesday.correctAnswer: They are going to visit us next week.

wednesday.question: Complete: 'He _____ (know) the answer, but he forgot to say it.'
Complete with 'was' or 'were': 'You _____ not at the gym yesterday.'
Translate 'I'd like to invite you to my get-together.' to Portuguese.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Eu gostaria de te convidar para o meu encontro.|Quero te convidar para minha reunião.

wednesday.question: What is the correct question tag? 'They had a great time, _____?'
Complete: 'She _____ (study) for her English test all night.'
Complete the invitation: 'Let's _____ to a new restaurant this weekend!'
Translate 'She was really excited about the trip.' to Portuguese.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Ela estava muito animada com a viagem.|Ela ficou muito empolgada com a viagem.

wednesday.question: Choose the correct form: 'We _____ dinner at the new restaurant last Friday.'
Complete: 'He _____ (speak) to the manager about the problem yesterday.'
Complete: 'She is going _____ cook dinner for us tonight.'
Translate 'How was your day?' to Portuguese.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Como foi o seu dia?|Como foi seu dia?

thursday.question: Choose the correct past tense of 'think':
Complete: 'We _____ (watch) a documentary about the ocean last night.'
Complete with the correct past form of 'be': '_____ you at the school event two days ago?'
Translate 'I'd love to, but I already have plans.' to Portuguese.
thursday.correctAnswer: Adoraria, mas já tenho planos.|Eu adoraria, mas já tenho compromissos.

thursday.question: Which sentence is NOT grammatically correct?
options: They didn't went to the game.
thursday.correctAnswer: They didn't went to the game.

thursday.question: Complete: 'They _____ (give) me a surprise gift on my birthday last year.'
Complete with the correct verb form: 'He didn't _____ (tell) her the truth.'
Translate 'That sounds great!' to Portuguese.
Choose the sentence that makes an invitation:
options: I went to the concert last week.
Would you like to join us for coffee?
thursday.correctAnswer: Would you like to join us for coffee?

thursday.question: Complete: 'I _____ (wake) up very late on Sunday morning.'
Complete with the correct auxiliary: '_____ she going to call you tonight?'
Translate 'He was very tired after the long trip.' to Portuguese.
thursday.correctAnswer: Ele estava muito cansado depois da longa viagem.|Ele ficou muito cansado após a viagem.

thursday.question: Which question is correctly formed?
Complete: 'She _____ (buy) a new dress for the party last weekend.'
Complete: 'I am going to _____ my family next month.' (use 'visit')
Translate 'Did you have a good time at the barbecue?' to Portuguese.
thursday.correctAnswer: Você se divertiu no churrasco?|Você passou bem no churrasco?

thursday.question: Choose the correct form for the blank: 'I _____ the news on TV three days ago.'
Complete: 'They are _____ to organize a get-together next Friday.'
Complete the negative sentence: 'We _____ at the concert — we were at home.' (past of 'be' + negative, contracted)
Translate 'I'm sorry, I can't make it tonight.' to Portuguese.
thursday.correctAnswer: Desculpe, não consigo ir esta noite.|Sinto muito, não posso esta noite.

friday.question: Which is the correct past tense of 'say'?
Complete: 'She _____ (come) back from her trip last Tuesday.'
Complete with the correct form: 'Did he _____ (read) the book before the class?'
Translate 'I'd love to!' to Portuguese.
Which sentence correctly declines an invitation?
options: I'd love to, but I have to work.
friday.correctAnswer: I'd love to, but I have to work.

friday.question: Complete: 'He _____ (do) his homework right after dinner yesterday.'
Complete the negative sentence: 'She _____ happy about the result.' (past of 'be' + negative, contracted)
Translate 'He went to the beach last summer and had an amazing time.' to Portuguese.
friday.correctAnswer: Ele foi à praia no verão passado e se divertiu muito.|Ele foi à praia no último verão e teve um ótimo tempo.

friday.question: Which sentence uses 'going to' correctly for a future plan?
options: I am going to cook tomorrow.
friday.correctAnswer: I am going to cook tomorrow.

friday.question: Complete: 'We _____ (stay) at a beautiful hotel when we visited the city.'
Complete with the correct past form of 'be': 'You and I _____ at the same school five years ago.'
Translate 'She is going to organize a party next Saturday.' to Portuguese.
friday.correctAnswer: Ela vai organizar uma festa no próximo sábado.|Ela está planejando organizar uma festa no sábado que vem.

friday.question: Choose the correct auxiliary: '_____ they have dinner together last night?'
Complete: 'She _____ (tell) me a funny story at the party.'
Complete the invitation: '_____ you like to come to my barbecue this Sunday?'
Translate 'The trip was exciting and fun.' to Portuguese.
friday.correctAnswer: A viagem foi emocionante e divertida.|A viagem foi animada e divertida.

friday.question: Which sentence correctly uses a time expression with the simple past?
options: She visited her friend last week.
She is visiting her friend last night.
She was visit her friend ago.
friday.correctAnswer: She visited her friend last week.

friday.question: Complete: 'I _____ (find) my keys right after I stopped looking for them.'
Complete the uncertain response to an invitation: 'Can I _____ back to you?' (two words, use 'get')
Translate 'What are you going to do this weekend?' to Portuguese.
friday.correctAnswer: O que você vai fazer neste fim de semana?|O que você vai fazer no fim de semana?
